plan_type_rationale: Rule 6 fallthrough: focused exclusion-pattern fix in 2 co-located files. No architectural change, no multi-layer impact.

phases.title: Add Minified Bundle Exclusion Patterns and Verify
phases.description: Add minified JS bundle exclusion patterns to DEFAULT_PIPELINE_IGNORE_PATTERNS (ignore-rules.ts) and DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS (scanner.ts). Rebuild TypeScript. Verify against gridiron-franchise populate run.

tasks.description: Read src/pipeline/ignore-rules.ts and src/scanner/scanner.ts to confirm exact line positions and current pattern lists before editing.
tasks.success_criteria: Both files read; DEFAULT_PIPELINE_IGNORE_PATTERNS and DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS locations confirmed

tasks.description: In src/pipeline/ignore-rules.ts: add to DEFAULT_PIPELINE_IGNORE_PATTERNS: glob patterns for minified bundles (workbox-*.js, content-hashed bundles, and files ending in .minified.js). Add comment: '// Minified/hashed build artifacts (workbox, webpack chunks)'
tasks.success_criteria: Patterns appended to DEFAULT_PIPELINE_IGNORE_PATTERNS. File parses (no syntax errors). Pattern comment present.

tasks.description: In src/scanner/scanner.ts: add the same three patterns to DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS. Add same comment: '// Minified/hashed build artifacts (workbox, webpack chunks)'
tasks.success_criteria: Patterns appended to DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS. File parses. Comment present. Both files now consistent.

tasks.description: Run npm run build in coderef-core root to compile TypeScript. Confirm no type errors.
tasks.success_criteria: Build exits 0. No TypeScript errors in ignore-rules.ts or scanner.ts.

tasks.description: Run coderef-pipeline against gridiron-franchise project: node dist/src/cli/coderef-pipeline.js --project-dir <gridiron-franchise-path> --only scan,populate --dry-run first, then actual run. Confirm populate exits 0 and no duplicate node identity errors appear in output.
tasks.success_criteria: populate leg exits 0. No 'duplicate node identities' or 'node_id_uniqueness' errors in output. complexity/summary.json generated.

tasks.description: Stage and commit: src/pipeline/ignore-rules.ts, src/scanner/scanner.ts. Message: fix(pipeline): exclude minified JS bundles from scan/populate scope
tasks.success_criteria: Clean git commit. No untracked changes in staged files.
